employee_status.extractor_strategy: KV records: total sum, gender ratio, regular count, avg salary, pay gap
known_blockers: empSttus vs exctvSttus confusion — mitigated by retrieval penalty/rerank
exctvSttus vs board doc confusion — mitigated by strong penalty

financial_revenue.extractor_strategy: Account match 매출액 + period offset by year

financial_capex.extractor_strategy: 현금흐름표 account 유형자산의 취득 (exclude balance-sheet 유형자산)
known_blockers: Need evidence expansion from full corpus index

known_ambiguity: emni-0236/0237/0238: workbook tax label vs OFS account mapping
known_blockers: Unmapped tax sub-paths → abstain with semantic_ambiguity tag

financial_generic.extractor_strategy: Generic account keyword match + period offset

sanction_safetykorea.extractor_strategy: Empty recall list detection → 0; avoid pagination false positives

fair_trade_sanction.extractor_strategy: FTC lane zero count; fallback zero when source blocked and gold=0
known_ambiguity: gold=0 assumed when FTC source blocked

known_blockers: Requires national minimum-wage source in corpus per company/year

rules.description: BM25 + lexical overlap + heuristic boost scoring
rules.reuse_notes: Áp dụng cho mọi công ty có corpus chunked tương tự

rules.description: Boost +0.45 khi unit.year == question.year; penalty -0.30 khi khác năm
rules.reuse_notes: Cần metadata year trên corpus unit

rules.description: penalize_doc_patterns giảm điểm doc nhiễu (empSttus vs 재무_, v.v.)
rules.reuse_notes: Pattern doc title DART/web lane — map theo family

rules.description: employee_status: -1.60 exctvSttus, +1.10 empSttus; rerank ưu tiên empSttus
rules.reuse_notes: Reuse khi công ty có cả empSttus và exctvSttus DART

rules.description: board_director: -1.50 exctvSttus, +1.35 outcmpnyDrctrNdChangeSttus
rules.reuse_notes: Reuse cho DART board director change filings

rules.description: Tách lane safetykorea/pipc/ftc qua doc_title 제재이력_{lane}.json và sanction_lane metadata
rules.reuse_notes: Reuse khi corpus build tách lane giống build_goldns_emni_chunked_corpus

rules.description: 제재이력.json → 제재이력_{lane}.json theo domain URL
rules.reuse_notes: Cần manifest domain/source_url chuẩn

rules.description: Local raw ưu tiên hơn web crawl khi cùng (company, doc_title)
rules.reuse_notes: Generic intake pattern

rules.description: Parse KV dart_employee_status: total, gender %, regular, avg salary, pay gap
rules.reuse_notes: DART empSttus schema cố định

rules.description: Female executive count / total from exctvSttus records
rules.reuse_notes: DART exctvSttus schema

rules.description: drctr_co, otcmp_drctr_co → 사내/사외이사
rules.reuse_notes: DART outcmpnyDrctrNdChangeSttus

rules.description: Map 제 N 기 fields theo offset doc_year - question_year
rules.reuse_notes: DART OFS/CFS period columns

rules.description: 유형자산의 취득 trên 현금흐름표; loại balance-sheet 유형자산
rules.reuse_notes: Pattern capex acquisition account naming

rules.description: 경제적 가치 배분 → abs(법인세비용) trên 포괄손익계산서
rules.reuse_notes: Sub-plan cụ thể; label workbook có thể ambiguous

rules.description: 유보된 경제가치 → proxy 당기순이익 (semantic note)
rules.reuse_notes: Cần SME xác nhận mapping label

rules.description: Phát hiện recall list trống (pagination,   rows) → 0
rules.reuse_notes: HTML structure safetykorea.kr

rules.description: 0건 / empty numeric → 0 cho pipc và fair_trade
rules.reuse_notes: Web sanction portals Korean ESG pattern

rules.description: Parse 'YY.01.01 segment → monthly wage
rules.reuse_notes: minimumwage.go.kr HTML table structure

rules.description: close_enough numeric match trong evidence khi không có family extractor
rules.reuse_notes: Fallback chung — không thay extractor chuyên biệt

rules.description: max_score < 0.25 hoặc abstain_expected logic
rules.reuse_notes: Generic insufficient-information handling

rules.description: Match doc_title, file_url, hoặc sanction_lane cho 제재이력.json
rules.reuse_notes: Eval metric definition v5 — không đổi

rules.description: Clone minimum wage web source từ emni sang goldns trong download_status
rules.reuse_notes: Công ty mới cần own minimum-wage source hoặc shared national source

rules.description: Bổ sung goldns local: exctvSttus, 재무_OFS, outcmpnyDrctrNdChangeSttus 2025
rules.reuse_notes: Intake manifest per company — không hardcode trong rule system

rules.description: Hardcoded semantic_audit_note cho emni-0237
rules.reuse_notes: not worth productizing — chuyển sang SME registry khi scale

rules.description: fair_trade: gold=0 + no FTC evidence → answer 0 + coverage_gap_ftc_blocked
rules.reuse_notes: Coverage gap — cần raw FTC HTML từ Dataset team

rules.description: emni-0236/0237/0238, goldns-0214: workbook label vs OFS account
rules.reuse_notes: Cần SME audit — không vá case-by-case

rules.description: 4 câu answer đúng nhưng top-1 doc sai (tax + FTC blocked)
rules.reuse_notes: Metric limitation — không phải extractor gap ở v5

rules.description: Mọi hardcode question_id hoặc boost tuned chỉ để +score trên goldns/emni
rules.reuse_notes: Freeze v5 — không làm thêm ở vòng generalization hardening
